$comment: $id contains the `your-org` placeholder; replace before publishing via the sed recipe in README §0.
title: Eval Case
description: A single prompt-regression eval case: fixed input + expected output metrics. Scored by `ai-pipe eval <dir> --outputs <dir>` against a recorded agent output at <outputs>/<name>.json. Each metric reads a fixed output field (req_ids_min→req_ids.length, spec_path_exists→spec_path, downstream_notes_not_null→downstream_notes, status_in→status).

agent.description: Which agent this case exercises (e.g. pm, backend-eng).

input.description: Verbatim user/task input fed to the agent.

metric.description: Expected output assertions. Only the keys below are recognized; `ai-pipe eval` treats an unknown metric key as a failure (typo-loud), so additionalProperties is false.

req_ids_min.description: Minimum number of REQ-N requirement ids the output must contain.

spec_path_exists.description: Output's spec_path must point at a file that was created (resolved relative to the project root / cwd where eval runs).

downstream_notes_not_null.description: downstream_notes must be a non-null object (spec §4.3).

status_in.description: Output status must be one of these values.
